title: SDLC Config
description: Formalizes skills/sdlc-config-management/SKILL.md's Output Format. Per-product configuration file, populated by /sdlc-start, recording only fields that differ from CLAUDE.md's Tech Stack Defaults. Absence of a field means the CLAUDE.md default applies (the override-only principle) — this schema therefore makes every content field optional except the identity fields (product, product_slug) and _meta.

updated_by.description: A decision ID (e.g. D012) or the event that produced the most recent change — per the Versioning and Change Management section, every config change traces to a decision.

product_slug.description: Set once at /sdlc-start. Used as the prefix in every artifact ID for this product (see artifact-manifest's ID scheme).

tech_stack_overrides.description: Override-only: a field appears here ONLY if it differs from CLAUDE.md's Tech Stack Defaults table. A product using every default unchanged has an empty (or absent) tech_stack_overrides. Keys are not a closed set — they track whatever rows CLAUDE.md's Tech Stack Defaults table defines, which may grow over time.

optional_database.description: The one Tech Stack Defaults row CLAUDE.md exposes as an explicit choice rather than a fixed default.

additionalProperties.description: Any other Tech Stack Defaults row this product overrides (e.g. graph_database, api_framework) — a single string naming the override value.

compliance_frameworks.description: Which compliance frameworks and control families this product must satisfy. Specific enough to act on — 'SOC 2 - CC6, CC7, A1', never just 'SOC 2' (see Anti-Patterns: Vague deployment/compliance fields).

deployment_model.description: The specific deployment option this product/instance uses — named specifically (e.g. 'Option B — managed private cloud, dedicated tenant'), never vaguely (e.g. 'private').

methodology_parameters.description: Product-specific values for the narrow set of factory-wide tuning parameters individual skills define (e.g. mutation_test_cadence, unit_test_coverage_minimum). Never used to weaken one of the five non-negotiable methodologies themselves — only to tune a calibration point within one.

additionalProperties.description: A parameter value — string or number depending on the parameter (e.g. a cadence is a string, a coverage threshold is a number).
